16	const TITLE_PATTERN =
17	  /(senior|lead|principal|staff|junior)?\s*(engineer|developer|manager|director|architect|analyst|consultant)/gi
18	
19	const TICKET_PREDICATES = [
20	  'raised_ticket',
21	  'assigned_ticket',
22	  'owns_ticket',
23	  'ticket',
24	  'incident',
25	]
26	
27	const CONNECTION_EXCLUDE_PREDICATES = [
28	  ...TICKET_PREDICATES,
29	  'email',
30	  'phone',
31	  'address',
32	  'url',
33	  'website',
34	]
35	
36	const PEOPLE_TYPES = new Set(['person'])
37	const TASK_TYPES = new Set(['task', 'project', 'process'])
38	const TICKET_FOCUS_TYPES = new Set(['ticket', 'communication', 'person'])
39	const CONNECTION_TERMS = '(?:connections?|contacts?|kontakte?|verbindungen?|netzwerk)'
40	const TICKET_TERMS = '(?:tickets?|issues?)'
41	
42	function asText(value: unknown): string {
43	  if (value == null) return ''
44	  if (typeof value === 'string') return value
45	  if (typeof value === 'number' || typeof value === 'boolean') return String(value)
46	  if (Array.isArray(value)) return value.map((v) => asText(v)).join(' ')
47	  if (typeof value === 'object') {
48	    return Object.values(value as Record<string, unknown>)
49	      .map((v) => asText(v))
50	      .join(' ')
51	  }
52	  return ''
53	}
54	
55	function parseIntegerToken(raw: string | undefined): number | null {
56	  if (!raw) return null
57	  const digits = raw.replace(/[^\d]/g, '')
58	  if (!digits) return null
59	  const value = Number.parseInt(digits, 10)
60	  return Number.isFinite(value) ? value : null
61	}
62	
63	function extractConstraint(query: string, termPattern: string): FilterConstraint {
64	  const patterns: Array<{ op: 'gt' | 'gte'; re: RegExp }> = [
65	    { op: 'gt', re: new RegExp(`(?:mehr\\s+als|ueber|über|over|>)\\s*([\\d.,_\\s]+)\\s*${termPattern}`, 'i') },
66	    { op: 'gte', re: new RegExp(`(?:mindestens|at\\s+least|>=|mind\\.)\\s*([\\d.,_\\s]+)\\s*${termPattern}`, 'i') },
67	    { op: 'gt', re: new RegExp(`${termPattern}\\s*(?:mehr\\s+als|ueber|über|over|>)\\s*([\\d.,_\\s]+)`, 'i') },
68	    { op: 'gte', re: new RegExp(`${termPattern}\\s*(?:mindestens|at\\s+least|>=|mind\\.)\\s*([\\d.,_\\s]+)`, 'i') },
69	    { op: 'gte', re: new RegExp(`([\\d.,_\\s]+)\\s*\\+\\s*${termPattern}`, 'i') },
70	    { op: 'gte', re: new RegExp(`${termPattern}\\s*([\\d.,_\\s]+)\\s*\\+`, 'i') },
71	  ]
72	
73	  for (const pattern of patterns) {
74	    const match = query.match(pattern.re)
75	    const value = parseIntegerToken(match?.[1])
76	    if (value == null) continue
77	    return { op: pattern.op, value }
78	  }
79	
80	  return null
81	}
82	
83	function hasUnsupportedNegation(q: string): boolean {
84	  return /\b(ohne|kein|keine|keinen|nicht|weniger\s+als|at\s+most|max(?:imal)?|<=|<|under)\b/i.test(q)
85	}
86	
87	function getEntityText(entity: Entity): string {
88	  return [
89	    entity.canonical_name,
90	    entity.aliases.join(' '),
91	    asText(entity.attrs),
92	  ]
93	    .join(' ')
94	    .toLowerCase()
95	}
96	
97	export function parseInterpretation(query: string): CascadeInterpretation {
98	  const q = query.toLowerCase()
99	
100	  const titleMatches = [...query.matchAll(TITLE_PATTERN)]
101	  const titleTerms = titleMatches
102	    .flatMap((m) => [m[1], m[2]])
103	    .filter((part): part is string => !!part)
104	    .map((part) => part.toLowerCase())
105	
106	  const ticketConstraint = extractConstraint(query, TICKET_TERMS)
107	  const connectionConstraint = extractConstraint(query, CONNECTION_TERMS)
108	
109	  const warnings: string[] = []
110	  if (hasUnsupportedNegation(q) && (/\b(tickets?|incidents?|issues?)\b/i.test(q) || /\b(connection|connections|contact|contacts|kontakt|kontakte|verbindung|verbindungen|netzwerk)\b/i.test(q))) {
111	    warnings.push('Negationen wie "ohne", "weniger als" oder "<=" werden aktuell nur eingeschränkt unterstützt.')
112	  }
113	
114	  return {
115	    titleTerms,
116	    wantsTasks: /\b(workstream|task|todo|to-do|schritt|steps?)\b/i.test(q),
117	    wantsTickets: /\b(tickets?|incidents?|issues?)\b/i.test(q),
118	    wantsConnections: /\b(connection|connections|kontakt|kontakte|verbindung|verbindungen|netzwerk)\b/i.test(q),
119	    wantsPeople: /\b(person|personen|people|employee|employees|mitarbeiter)\b/i.test(q),
120	    ticketConstraint,
121	    connectionConstraint,
122	    warnings,
123	  }
124	}
125	
126	export function getTicketCount(entity: Entity): number {
127	  return entity.facts.filter((fact) => {
128	    const predicate = String(fact.predicate || '').toLowerCase()
129	    if (TICKET_PREDICATES.some((token) => predicate.includes(token))) return true
130	
131	    if (fact.object_literal == null) return false
132	    const literal = String(fact.object_literal).toLowerCase()
133	    return literal.includes('ticket') || literal.startsWith('inc-') || literal.startsWith('req-')
134	  }).length
135	}
136	
137	export function getConnectionCount(entity: Entity): number {
138	  return new Set(
139	    entity.facts
140	      .filter((fact) => {
141	        if (!fact.object_id) return false
142	        const predicate = String(fact.predicate || '').toLowerCase()
143	        return !CONNECTION_EXCLUDE_PREDICATES.some((token) => predicate.includes(token))
144	      })
145	      .map((fact) => fact.object_id)
146	      .filter((id): id is string => typeof id === 'string' && id.length > 0),
147	  ).size
148	}
149	
150	export function cascadeFilter(results: SearchResultItem[], intent: CascadeInterpretation): { filtered: SearchResultItem[]; steps: string[] } {
151	  let filtered = [...results]
152	  const steps: string[] = []
153	
154	  steps.push(`Hybrid Search geliefert: ${results.length} Kandidaten`)
155	
156	  if (intent.wantsPeople || intent.titleTerms.length > 0 || intent.wantsConnections || intent.connectionConstraint) {
157	    filtered = filtered.filter((result) => PEOPLE_TYPES.has(String(result.entity.entity_type).toLowerCase()))
158	    steps.push(`Personen-Fokus: ${filtered.length} übrig`)
159	  }
160	
161	  if (intent.titleTerms.length > 0) {
162	    filtered = filtered.filter((result) => {
163	      const text = getEntityText(result.entity)
164	      return intent.titleTerms.every((term) => text.includes(term))
165	    })
166	    steps.push(`Titel-Filter (${intent.titleTerms.join(' + ')}): ${filtered.length} übrig`)
167	  }
168	
169	  if (intent.ticketConstraint) {
170	    const constraint = intent.ticketConstraint
171	    filtered = filtered.filter((result) => {
172	      const count = getTicketCount(result.entity)
173	      if (constraint.op === 'gt') return count > constraint.value
174	      return count >= constraint.value
175	    })
176	    const opLabel = constraint.op === 'gt' ? '>' : '≥'
177	    steps.push(`Ticket-Filter (${opLabel} ${constraint.value}): ${filtered.length} übrig`)
178	  }
179	
180	  if (intent.connectionConstraint) {
181	    const constraint = intent.connectionConstraint
182	    filtered = filtered.filter((result) => {
183	      const count = getConnectionCount(result.entity)
184	      if (constraint.op === 'gt') return count > constraint.value
185	      return count >= constraint.value
186	    })
187	    const opLabel = constraint.op === 'gt' ? '>' : '≥'
188	    steps.push(`Connections-Filter (${opLabel} ${constraint.value}): ${filtered.length} übrig`)
189	  }
190	
191	  if (intent.wantsTasks && !intent.wantsTickets) {
192	    filtered = filtered.filter((result) => TASK_TYPES.has(String(result.entity.entity_type).toLowerCase()))
193	    steps.push(`Workstream/Task-Fokus: ${filtered.length} übrig`)
194	  }
195	
196	  if (intent.wantsTickets && intent.titleTerms.length === 0 && !intent.ticketConstraint) {
197	    filtered = filtered.filter((result) => TICKET_FOCUS_TYPES.has(String(result.entity.entity_type).toLowerCase()))
198	    steps.push(`Ticket-Fokus: ${filtered.length} übrig`)
199	  }
200	
201	  for (const warning of intent.warnings) {
202	    steps.push(`Hinweis: ${warning}`)
203	  }
204	
205	  filtered.sort((a, b) => {
206	    if (intent.wantsConnections || intent.connectionConstraint) {
207	      const connectionDelta = getConnectionCount(b.entity) - getConnectionCount(a.entity)
208	      if (connectionDelta !== 0) return connectionDelta
209	    }
210	    const ticketDelta = getTicketCount(b.entity) - getTicketCount(a.entity)
211	    if (ticketDelta !== 0) return ticketDelta
212	    return b.score - a.score
213	  })
214	
215	  return { filtered, steps }
216	}
217	
218	export function describeResult(entity: Entity): string {
219	  const role = asText(entity.attrs).trim()
220	  const ticketCount = getTicketCount(entity)
221	  const connectionCount = getConnectionCount(entity)
222	  if (role) {
223	    return `${entity.canonical_name} · ${String(entity.entity_type)} · ${connectionCount} Connections · ${ticketCount} Tickets · ${role.slice(0, 90)}`
224	  }
225	  return `${entity.canonical_name} · ${String(entity.entity_type)} · ${connectionCount} Connections · ${ticketCount} Tickets`
226	}

content.text: The problem is clear: `parseInterpretation("Karen Bender")` extracts no title terms and no "wantsPeople" flag, so `cascadeFilter` applies zero filtering — all connected entities (communications, orgs, etc.) come back sorted by score, and Karen Bender herself ends up buried. I need to add name-match detection before `buildPayload` that scans all raw results for an exact name hit.

28	
29	function buildPayload(query: string, results: SearchResultItem[]): AssistantPayload {
30	  const intent = parseInterpretation(query)
31	  const { filtered, steps } = cascadeFilter(results, intent)
32	  if (filtered.length === 0) {
33	    return { text: 'Nichts Passendes gefunden. Versuche andere Suchbegriffe.', steps, matches: [] }
34	  }
35	  const top = filtered.slice(0, 6)
36	  return { text: `${top.length} Treffer gefunden:`, steps, matches: top }
37	}

39	// ── Resizable chat panel ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
40	
41	const MIN_H = 88   // handle + full input bar
42	const MAX_H = 480
43	
44	function BrowseChat() {
45	  const navigate = useNavigate()
46	  const [messages, setMessages] = useState<ChatMessage[]>([
47	    { id: 'init', role: 'assistant', content: 'Frag mich etwas — z. B. "Wo ist Anna Müller?" oder "Senior Engineers mit Tickets".' },
48	  ])
49	  const [input, setInput] = useState('')
50	  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
51	  const [chatHeight, setChatHeight] = useState(MIN_H)
52	  const endRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
53	
54	  const showMessages = chatHeight > MIN_H + 10
55	
56	  useEffect(() => {
57	    if (showMessages) endRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
58	  }, [messages, showMessages])
59	
60	  const canSend = useMemo(() => input.trim().length > 0 && !isLoading, [input, isLoading])
61	
62	  // Drag-to-resize handle
63	  function startResize(e: React.MouseEvent) {
64	    e.preventDefault()
65	    const startY = e.clientY
66	    const startH = chatHeight
67	
68	    function onMove(ev: MouseEvent) {
69	      const delta = startY - ev.clientY
70	      setChatHeight(Math.max(MIN_H, Math.min(MAX_H, startH + delta)))
71	    }
72	    function onUp() {
73	      document.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMove)
74	      document.removeEventListener('mouseup', onUp)
75	    }
76	    document.addEventListener('mousemove', onMove)
77	    document.addEventListener('mouseup', onUp)
78	  }
79	
80	  async function handleSend() {
81	    const query = input.trim()
82	    if (!canSend || !query) return
83	    const intent = parseInterpretation(query)
84	    const needsWider = Boolean(
85	      intent.titleTerms.length > 0 || intent.ticketConstraint ||
86	      intent.connectionConstraint || intent.wantsConnections,
87	    )
88	    setMessages(prev => [...prev, { id: `u-${Date.now()}`, role: 'user', content: query }])
89	    setInput('')
90	    setIsLoading(true)
91	    if (!showMessages) setChatHeight(240)
92	
93	    try {
94	      const res = await searchMemory({ query, k: needsWider ? 120 : 40 })
95	      const payload = buildPayload(query, res.results)
96	
97	      // ── Unique result → navigate directly, no card list ──
98	      if (payload.matches.length === 1) {
99	        const single = payload.matches[0]
100	        navigate(`/browse/${encodeURIComponent(single.entity.id)}`)
101	        setMessages(prev => [...prev, {
102	          id: `a-${Date.now()}`, role: 'assistant',
103	          content: `→ „${single.entity.canonical_name}" gefunden — direkt geöffnet.`,
104	        }])
105	        return
106	      }
107	
108	      // ── Multiple results → show list ──
109	      setMessages(prev => [...prev, { id: `a-${Date.now()}`, role: 'assistant', content: payload.text, payload }])
110	    } catch (err) {
111	      setMessages(prev => [...prev, { id: `e-${Date.now()}`, role: 'assistant', content: `Fehler: ${(err as Error).message}` }])
112	    } finally {
113	      setIsLoading(false)
114	    }
115	  }
116	
117	  const extraMessages = messages.length - 1
118	
119	  return (
120	    <div style={{

content.text:
Builds clean. Now when you type "Karen Bender" (or "Wo ist Karen Bender?"), `findNameMatch` scans all raw API results before `cascadeFilter` runs, finds the entity whose `canonical_name` contains both tokens, and navigates directly — opening the folder and highlighting the file in the VFS tree.

The logic: strip German/English stopwords + punctuation, require all remaining tokens to appear in the canonical name. Person entities are checked first, then any type, with a max of 4 tokens to avoid matching on full sentence queries.

content.text:
The API data is fine — 500 entities per type come through the proxy correctly. The `0 entities` is a caching issue: the query was initialized with `refetchOnMount: false` and `staleTime: 5min`, so if it first ran before the server was ready (empty result), it stays cached. I'll fix both issues together.

**Issue 1**: Use `section.count` from the API for the folder card count, and remove `refetchOnMount: false` so stale data refreshes.  
**Issue 2**: Add collapse state to AppShell.

content.text:
Clean build. Here's what changed:

**Issue 1 (0 entities)**: Two fixes:
- Folder cards now show `section.count` from the API (the true total from the DB, e.g. 1181 persons) instead of `section.items.length` — so the count is always correct regardless of load timing
- Removed `refetchOnMount: false` from the tree query, so if the cache has stale/empty data it will re-fetch on the next mount (staleTime is now 1 minute)

**Issue 2 (sidebar collapse)**: The `PanelLeftClose` button now actually collapses the sidebar (width → 0, smooth transition). When collapsed, a `PanelLeftOpen` button appears in the top-left corner of the main content to bring it back.

content.text:
Clean. Here's what changed:

- **Logo**: Purple `#5b5bd6` rounded square with `Database` icon + "Qontext" text — matches the original design
- **Workspace button**: Now shows the same purple Database icon + "Qontext" instead of ACME
- **Help + Settings removed** — footer now only has the user row
- **Overlap fixed**: When collapsed, instead of an absolute button floating over the content, a dedicated 48px strip appears between the (zero-width) sidebar and the main area — sits in its own layout slot so it can never overlap the "Context vaults" topbar text
